questions.question: This "Bad Guy" singer is often seen wearing baggy clothing.
This 2012 film tells the story of a foul-mouthed stuffed animal that's been brought to life.
In a 2019 Disney+ series, a group of theater students produce a staging of what film franchise?
questions.answer: High School Musical: The Musical: The Series

questions.question: According to this credit card company, "There are some things money can't buy. For everything else, there's..."?
This Pixar-produced film tells the story of Merida, a Scottish princess and expert archer who wishes to follow her own path in life.
